MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Jan-12-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT LEOPOLDO PADRON'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

No opposition filed; motion granted. Responses shall be served by February 1, 2023. Sanctions of $750 awarded to Defendant and payable by February 1, 2023.

The moving party is to prepare and submit a proposed order to the pro tem judge at davididaho14@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: Sean Kane / R. Sahatjian; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT LEOPOLDO PADRON's Motion To Compel Initial Responses To Defendant's Request Identification And Production Of Documents.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling, as follows:

No opposition filed; motion granted. Responses shall be served by February 1, 2023. Sanctions of $750 awarded to Defendant and payable by February 1, 2023.

The moving party is to prepare and submit a proposed order to the pro tem judge at davididaho14@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald ; Clerk: Sean Kane / R. Sahatjian; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
